title: Primate (Yevethan rank)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Primate''' was a title used among the [[Yevetha]] for the commanding officer of a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]]. Like most prominent ''[[nitakka]]'', a primate was typically assisted by his [[Second (Yevethan)|second]].

The same title was used by the [[Fian/Legends|Fia]] of [[Galantos]], just above the position of [[Assistant Primate]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Before the Storm (abridged audiobook)|''Before the Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''
